inputs.label: First Number
inputs.businessContext: First integer for the multi-number GCD calculation.

inputs.label: Second Number
inputs.businessContext: Second integer for the multi-number GCD calculation.

inputs.label: Third Number
inputs.businessContext: Third integer for the multi-number GCD calculation.

inputs.label: Fourth Number
inputs.businessContext: Fourth integer for the multi-number GCD calculation.

formulas.gcd_ab: ((a,b) => { while(b) { [a,b] = [b, a % b]; } return Math.abs(a); })(num1, num2)
formulas.gcd_cd: ((a,b) => { while(b) { [a,b] = [b, a % b]; } return Math.abs(a); })(num3, num4)
formulas.total_gcd: ((a,b) => { while(b) { [a,b] = [b, a % b]; } return Math.abs(a); })(gcd_ab, gcd_cd)
